Auth0

const express = require('express');
const session = require('express-session');
const axios = require('axios');

const app = express();

// Configure session
app.use(session({
  secret: 'your-session-secret',
  resave: false,
  saveUninitialized: true
}));

// Auth0 configuration
const auth0Domain = 'YOUR_AUTH0_DOMAIN';
const clientID = 'YOUR_AUTH0_CLIENT_ID';
const clientSecret = 'YOUR_AUTH0_CLIENT_SECRET';
const callbackURL = 'http://localhost:3000/callback';

// Redirect to Auth0 for login
app.get('/login', (req, res) => {
  const redirectUri = `https://${auth0Domain}/authorize?` +
    `client_id=${clientID}&` +
    `response_type=code&` +
    `redirect_uri=${callbackURL}&` +
    `scope=openid profile email`;

  res.redirect(redirectUri);
});

// Handle the callback from Auth0
app.get('/callback', async (req, res) => {
  const { code } = req.query;

  try {
    // Exchange the authorization code for tokens
    const tokenResponse = await axios.post(`https://${auth0Domain}/oauth/token`, {
      client_id: clientID,
      client_secret: clientSecret,
      code,
      grant_type: 'authorization_code',
      redirect_uri: callbackURL
    });

    const accessToken = tokenResponse.data.access_token;

    // Use the access token to fetch user profile
    const userResponse = await axios.get(`https://${auth0Domain}/userinfo`, {
      headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}` }
    });

    req.session.user = userResponse.data; // Store user info in session
    res.redirect('/success');
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error during callback:', error);
    res.redirect('/failure');
  }
});

// Success route
app.get('/success', (req, res) => {
  if (req.session.user) {
    res.send(`Welcome ${req.session.user.name}`);
  } else {
    res.redirect('/');
  }
});

// Failure route
app.get('/failure', (req, res) => {
  res.send('Failed to login');
});

// Logout route
app.get('/logout', (req, res) => {
  req.session.destroy(err => {
    res.redirect('/');
  });
});

// Home route
app.get('/', (req, res) => {
  res.send('<a href="/login">Login</a>');
});

// Start server
app.listen(3000, () => {
  console.log('Server listening on http://localhost:3000');
});
